summary: The main claim is: Regardless of the possibility, I think it is important to try to think through technical control interventions that might only work for alignment and not misalignment.
The concern about control symmetry is externalities, that is the degree to which safety research can end up being used towards harmful ends.

The main claim is: We believe that AI should be a useful tool for individual people, and thus customizable by each user up to limits defined by society.

top_comment.author: gwern
top_comment.text: If you do more work on this, I would suggest renaming it. I didn't find 'Gemini' to be that helpful a metaphor, and discussion of 'Gemini models' is already drowned out by Google's much-hyped upcoming 'Gemini model(s)' (which appear to be text-image models).
top_comment.claim: The comment's point: I didn't find 'Gemini' to be that helpful a metaphor, and discussion of 'Gemini models' is already drowned out by Google's much-hyped upcoming 'Gemini model(s)' (which appear to be text-image models).
